titleStmt.title: SII 36.229: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 229. (A.R. No. 229 of 1910.) CONJEEVERAM, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the Jvaraharēśvara temple.

summary.p: Assignment of 1600 kuḻis of land by Sundarachōḻaṉ, a kiḻāṉ of Vaḻashāṟu alias Kunivallanallūr of Viṟpēḍu-nāḍu, in Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, to the Suravaṭṭālamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār in the city of Kāñchipuram in Eyiṟ-kōṭṭam, for services in the temple as per a royal order issued by the king. Mentions a land measuring rod padinālaḍik-kōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkirama coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu
Añcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Eyiṟ koṭṭattu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu Uṭaiyār curavaṭṭā
lamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkku nitta nimatañ celvatāka Im maṇṭalattuk kāliyūr koṭṭattu viṟpeṭu nāṭṭu vaḻa
ṣāṟāṉa kunivalla nallūr teṟkkil Ēriyil cuntaracoḻaṉ maṇṭapattu Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruvāymoḻi
ntaruḷa prasādañ ceyta tirumukappaṭi Ivvūr viṣāṟu kiḻān cuntaracoḻaṉeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉārku devadāṉamāka viṭṭa ni
Ivvūr teṉ kaḻani mala vatikku kiḻakku meṟku Oṉṟukku taṭi Iraṇṭukku varukiṟa kālukku
meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai ceṅkeṇi kālukkut teṟkum teṉpāṟkellai viṟpeṭṭu Ūr kālukkum kumaravatikkum
vaṭakku Iṉṉāṟpāṟkellaikkum Uṭpaṭa taṭi Añciṉāl patinālaṭikkolāl kuḻi Āyirattu Aṟunūṟum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟ
ku nitta nimantañ ceyvatāka viṭṭom nāḷ 2 100 10 1 § viṣāṟu kiḻāneṉ
Digital edition of SII 36.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
